_meta.description: Senator → verified Bluesky handle mapping. Each entry must be confirmed against the senator's official .gov site or a confirmable DID before landing here. No parody accounts. No campaign-side. No staffer reposts.
_meta.verification_rule: verified_via must be a senate.gov URL or 'did_proof' (the senator's DID published on their own infrastructure).

schema.did: AT Protocol DID (did:plc:...) — populated on first resolution
schema.verified_via: URL or 'did_proof' marker showing how we confirmed this is the senator
schema.notes: free text — context, caveats, verification chain
